summary: Screening of 80 items yields 12 candidates: 5 mainstream product releases (Anthropic Sonnet 5, Claude Code origin, OpenAI eval paper, Google ADK 2.0, GitHub security advisories, Anthropic containment), 3 user workflow reports (free automation stack, SubChat for learning, NanoBanana MCP image editing), 2 infra primitives (Cline CVE, Omnigent meta-harness), and 1 research white paper. Top 8 meet direction quotas.

candidates.title: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 launch
candidates.why_it_matters: New frontier model for coding, agents, and professional work at scale.

candidates.title: The Making of Claude Code
candidates.why_it_matters: Inside story of Claude Code's evolution from internal CLI to Anthropic's coding agent.

candidates.title: OpenAI: Separating Signal from Noise in Coding Evaluations
candidates.why_it_matters: New approach to coding agent evaluations, crucial for benchmarking.

candidates.title: Google ADK Go 2.0 for Multi-Agent Applications
candidates.why_it_matters: Graph-based workflow engine, human-in-the-loop, and production-ready multi-agent framework.

candidates.title: GitHub Innersource Security Advisories GA
candidates.why_it_matters: Innersource security advisories now generally available, improving internal vulnerability management.

candidates.title: User automation stack: OpenHuman, Ollama, MiMoCode
candidates.why_it_matters:
Concrete free automation

candidates.title: CVE-2026-59723: High severity vulnerability in Cline coding agent
candidates.why_it_matters: High severity (8.8) vulnerability in autonomous coding agent Cline, prior to 3.0.30.

candidates.title: Anthropic: How We Contain Claude Across Products
candidates.why_it_matters: Engineering details on containment strategies for agentic AI across claude.ai and products.

candidates.title: Omnigent: Open-source meta-harness for AI agent orchestration
candidates.why_it_matters: 6.8k stars, orchestrates Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi with policy sandboxing.

candidates.title: NanoBanana MCP: Image editing from Claude Code terminal
candidates.why_it_matters: MCP server for image editing via Claude Code commands, no tab jungle.; social/discussion source (keep; label evidence)

candidates.title: Google Vibe Coding vs. Agentic Engineering White Paper
candidates.why_it_matters: White paper analyzing new SDLC with vibe coding and agentic engineering.

gaps: No missing direction classes; quotas met: 5 mainstream_product, 3 user_workflow, 2 infra_primitive, 1 research.
